Instead of asking a model to classify one document, LedgerShield asks it to investigate, unlock hidden evidence, choose controls, withstand pressure, and submit a proof-carrying decision under budget and step limits. **📖 Documentation hub:** See docs/README.md for a guided tour of all documentation, reading paths by role, and a map of what lives where. name: Redactor
description: Masking Personal Information in Legal Documents
summary: 🇮🇳 Indian Kanoon : Context-Aware PII Masker A sophisticated Python-based tool that interfaces with the **Indian Kanoon API** to fetch legal documents and intelligently masks sensitive information.
longSummary: 🇮🇳 Indian Kanoon : Context-Aware PII Masker A sophisticated Python-based tool that interfaces with the **Indian Kanoon API** to fetch legal documents and intelligently masks sensitive information. Unlike standard maskers that hide *everyone*, this tool uses **Context-Aware NLP** to specifically protect **Victims and their Families** while keeping Judges, Lawyers, and the Accused visible for legal context. name: LDMMA
description: Large Dimension Matrix Multiplier accelerator

longSummary: Large Dimension Matrix Multiplier Accelerator This repository implements a high-performance matrix multiplier accelerator using a **systolic array architecture** to handle large-dimension matrices. The design replaces the traditional MAC (Multiply-Accumulate) units within the systolic array with **Karatsuba multipliers** to enhance the efficiency and speed of matrix multiplications. name: project_signals
description: estimation of heart rate and breath rate
summary: PROJECT SIGNALS Introduction Estimating breath rate and heart rate from ECG signals involves analyzing the characteristics of the ECG waveform to identify peaks corresponding to both heartbeats and respiratory cycles.
longSummary: PROJECT SIGNALS Introduction Estimating breath rate and heart rate from ECG signals involves analyzing the characteristics of the ECG waveform to identify peaks corresponding to both heartbeats and respiratory cycles. Heart rate estimation Heart rate estimation involves calculating the number of heartbeats per minute (bpm) from the time intervals between consecutive R-peaks in an ECG signal. The formula to estimate heart rate (HR) is: HR=60/R-R-interval Where the R-R interval is the time interval between consecutiv...
